basicSettings.title: Basic Settings
basicSettings.subtitle: Profile, units, and preferences
basicSettings.healthDataSubtitle: Sync your workouts and body metrics
basicSettings.healthDataPrivacy: Your health data is only stored locally.
basicSettings.foodSearchBothDescription: Search Open Food Facts, USDA, and Musclog
basicSettings.foodSearchNoneDescription: Search only in your local database

migration.title: Data Migration
migration.description: Import data from old database to new WatermelonDB
migration.clickToCheck: Click Check Migration Data to see what can be migrated

advancedSettings.title: Local Data Settings
advancedSettings.subtitle: Data export, integrations, cache
advancedSettings.manageLocalBackupsSubtitle: View and restore automatic pre-migration backups

localBackups.title: Local Backups
localBackups.noBackupsDesc: Automatic backups are created before each database migration
localBackups.exportDisabled: Export disabled - encryption required or database unavailable
localBackups.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this backup file? This action cannot be undone.
localBackups.restoreConfirmMessage: This will replace all current data with the data from this backup. The app will reload after restoration.

advancedSettings.exportConfirmationSubtitle: Optionally protect the file with a phrase. Leave blank for no encryption.
advancedSettings.exportConfirmationSubtitleRequired: An encryption phrase is required. Enter a phrase to protect your backup.
advancedSettings.importConfirmationSubtitle: If the backup was encrypted, enter the same phrase used when exporting.
advancedSettings.encryptionPhrasePlaceholderRequired: Enter a phrase to encrypt the backup
advancedSettings.decryptionPhrasePlaceholder: Enter phrase if backup was encrypted
advancedSettings.encryptionPhraseRequired: An encryption phrase is required to export. Please enter one.
advancedSettings.requireExportEncryptionSubtitle: Always require an encryption phrase when exporting data
advancedSettings.disableEncryptionConfirmSubtitle: This will make your data exports less secure.
advancedSettings.disableEncryptionWarning: Disabling this setting will allow you to export your data without encryption. This makes your data vulnerable if the export file is intercepted or accessed by unauthorized parties.
advancedSettings.disableEncryptionInputLabel: Type the phrase below to confirm
advancedSettings.disableEncryptionHint: You must type the exact phrase above to proceed.
advancedSettings.exportFailedMessage: An error occurred while exporting. Please try again.
advancedSettings.importFailedMessage: An error occurred while importing. Please check the file and try again.
advancedSettings.anonymousBugReportSubtitle: Help improve Musclog by sending crash logs
advancedSettings.dailyMoodPromptSubtitle: Show a mood selector on the home screen if not yet recorded for today
advancedSettings.alwaysAllowFoodEditingSubtitle: Force food details to be editable even when sourced from the API
advancedSettings.showWeightPredictionSubtitle: Show a predicted weight card on the profile screen when no weight has been logged for 4 days
advancedSettings.intuitiveEatingModeSubtitle: Hide tracked amounts in the daily summary card, showing ?? instead of exact values
advancedSettings.chartTooltipLeftSubtitle: Show chart data tooltips on the top-left instead of top-right
advancedSettings.progressionModeWeightFirstSubtitle: Increase weight directly when RIR is high, rather than adding reps
advancedSettings.enableAdvancedDataManagementSubtitle: Unlock raw access to your app data — for advanced users only
advancedSettings.enableAdvancedDataManagementConfirmMessa: This is only for advanced users. Playing around with the data here can crash your app beyond repair — only use it if you know what you're doing.
advancedSettings.manageFoodDataSubtitle: View, edit, or delete your custom food entries
advancedSettings.manageNutritionLogsDataSubtitle: Review and modify your daily nutrition records
advancedSettings.manageMealsDataSubtitle: Organize and adjust your saved meal configurations
advancedSettings.managePortionsDataSubtitle: Handle custom portion sizes for various foods
advancedSettings.manageWorkoutsDataSubtitle: Edit or remove your personalized workout routines
advancedSettings.manageWorkoutsLogDataSubtitle: Access and modify your past workout sessions
advancedSettings.manageMetricsDataSubtitle: Track and adjust your body metrics and progress
advancedSettings.manageExercisesDataSubtitle: Maintain your custom exercise list and details
advancedSettings.manageGoalsDataSubtitle: View and manage your nutrition and body composition goals history
advancedSettings.manageCheckinsDataSubtitle: View and manage your progress check-ins
advancedSettings.clearAppDataSubtitle: Open Android settings to clear cache and data
advancedSettings.openSettingsFailedMessage: Unable to open app settings. Please open them manually.

chatMessages.title: Chat Messages
chatMessages.subtitle: View and edit your conversation history

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.apiKeyHelper: A Gemini API key is required to use Google Gemini. Get one from Google AI Studio.
aiSettings.localLlmApiKeyHelper: Most local LLMs don't require an API key, but you can set one if needed.
aiSettings.localLlmHelp: Need help? Check the official guide
aiSettings.selectGeminiModelSubtitle: Select the model to be used by all AI features
aiSettings.selectOpenAiModelSubtitle: Select the model to be used by all AI features
aiSettings.subtitle: Settings for all the AI used on this app
aiSettings.useOcrBeforeAi: Use OCR Before Sending to AI
aiSettings.useOcrBeforeAiSubtitle: Process images locally with OCR and send text instead
aiSettings.sendFoundationFoodsToLlmSubtitle: Improve ingredient matching using the foundation foods database
aiSettings.customPromptsSubtitle: Add your own instructions to all AI features
aiSettings.deletePromptConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt?
aiSettings.maxAiMemoriesSubtitle: Number of previous messages to remember in conversations

onDeviceAi.toggleSubtitle: Process AI requests on-device using Apple Foundation Models. No API key needed.
onDeviceAi.toggleSubtitleNotReady: Apple Intelligence is not available on this device. Requires iPhone 15 Pro or later with iOS 26 and Apple Intelligence enabled.
onDeviceAi.privacyNote: Your data stays on device and is never sent to external servers.
onDeviceAi.foundationFoodsDisabled: Foundation foods injection is disabled for on-device AI to save memory.

musclogFreeTier.toggleSubtitle: Access AI features without an API key. Subject to a daily request limit.
musclogFreeTier.activeNote: Free tier is active. Your own API keys are not used.

visualSettings.sectionSubtitle: Choose which shortcuts appear in the bottom bar. Home and Camera are always fixed.
visualSettings.selectItem: Choose a shortcut for this slot

nutritionDisplay.sectionSubtitle: Choose which macros are shown in the nutrition summary.
nutritionDisplay.label: Visible Macros

notificationsSettings.workoutRemindersSubtitle: Get notified on scheduled workout days
notificationsSettings.activeWorkoutSubtitle: Show timer and exercise in a persistent notification
notificationsSettings.nutritionOverviewSubtitle: Summary of your daily intake and goals
notificationsSettings.menstrualCycleSubtitle: Period predictions and fertile window alerts
